news.t: Tradr ETFs Launches Industry's First Quarterly Reset Leveraged ETFs - SPYQ, QQQP, TLTQ

overview.description: The Tradr 2X Long Innovation 100 Quarterly ETF (QQQP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide 2x exposure to the Invesco QQQ Trusts (ticker: QQQ-US) quarterly price returns through swap agreements with major global financial institutions. QQQP was launched on Sep 30, 2024 and is issued by Tradr.

data.title: Tradr ETFs Launches Industry's First Quarterly Reset Leveraged ETFs - SPYQ, QQQP, TLTQ
